member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Abstractions.IBootService
member.summary: Marker interface for boot-related services.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport
member.summary: Represents progress information for display in the UI.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.Percentage
member.summary: Overall completion percentage (0-100).

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.StepDescription
member.summary: Current step description (e.g., "Installing GPU drivers").

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.CurrentStep
member.summary: Current step number and total steps (e.g., "3 of 8").

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.SubStepInfo
member.summary: Sub-step information (e.g., "Downloading drivers: 50MB / 200MB").

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.ElapsedTime
member.summary: Time elapsed since start.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.EstimatedTimeRemaining
member.summary: Estimated time remaining.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.StepIcon
member.summary: Visual icon for current step (building, installing, verifying, etc).

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.IsIndeterminate
member.summary: Whether progress is indeterminate (unknown duration).

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.TimeRemaining
member.summary: Gets a human-readable time remaining string.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressReport.ElapsedTimeFormatted
member.summary: Gets a human-readable elapsed time string.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressStepIcon
member.summary: Icons representing different installation steps.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI
member.summary: Modern progress UI manager with smooth animations and detailed status display. Provides real-time progress updates with ETA calculations.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.Start
member.summary: Starts the progress timer.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.ReportProgress(System.Double,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressStepIcon,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reports progress update with automatic ETA calculation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.ReportStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Reports a status message without changing progress percentage.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.GetCurrentProgress
member.summary: Gets the current progress report snapshot.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.Stop
member.summary: Stops the progress timer and returns final statistics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.CalculateETA(System.Double,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Calculates estimated time remaining based on progress velocity.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.GetProgressBarVisualization(System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets formatted progress bar visualization (visual representation).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.GetStepIndicator(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a formatted step indicator (e.g., "Step 3 of 8").

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.GetIconCharacter(MonadoBlade.Boot.ProgressStepIcon)
member.summary: Gets icon character for the given step type.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.GetProgressHistory
member.summary: Gets progress history data for analytics or display.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.ModernProgressUI.Reset
member.summary: Resets the progress tracker.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder
member.summary: Async background service for building USB images with intelligent caching. Handles priority queueing and non-blocking notifications.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder},MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BackgroundUSBBuilder class.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.IsInitialized
member.summary: Gets whether the service is initialized.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.InitializeAsync
member.summary: Initializes the background builder service.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.GetMetrics
member.summary: Gets current performance metrics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.QueueUSBBuildAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Queues a USB creation request with priority handling.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously disposes resources.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.ProcessQueueAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes the priority queue in the background.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.ProcessUSBBuildAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a single USB build with caching support.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.BuildUSBImageAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds a new USB image.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.WriteCachedImageAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a cached image to the target disk.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.GenerateCacheKey(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Generates a cache key from request.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.GetPriority(System.String)
member.summary: Gets priority for a profile.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.GetBuildDuration(System.String)
member.summary: Gets build duration for a profile in milliseconds.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.GetImageSize(System.String)
member.summary: Gets simulated image size for a profile in bytes.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundUSBBuilder.SendBackgroundNotification(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sends a non-blocking background notification.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache
member.summary: Interface for USB image caching.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache.TryGetImage(System.String,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Tries to get a cached USB image.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache.StoreImage(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Stores a USB image in the cache.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache.GetStatistics
member.summary: Gets cache statistics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBImageCache.Clear
member.summary: Clears the cache.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics
member.summary: Metrics for the background USB builder.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics.CacheHits
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of cache hits.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics.CacheMisses
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of cache misses.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics.CacheHitRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache hit rate as a percentage.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics.AverageBuildTimeMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the average build time in milliseconds.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.BackgroundBuilderMetrics.QueuedItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of queued items.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheStatistics
member.summary: Statistics for the USB image cache.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheStatistics.ItemCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items in the cache.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheStatistics.TotalSizeBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total size of cached items in bytes.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheStatistics.MaxSizeBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum cache size in bytes.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheStatistics.UtilizationPercent
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache utilization as a percentage.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard
member.summary: Ultra-simplified USB creation wizard providing a single-page experience for users. Hides all complexity in advanced mode (Ctrl+Shift+A).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard},MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBCreationOrchestrator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SimpleUSBWizard class.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.SystemHostname
member.summary: Gets the system hostname for pre-filling the device name field.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.GetAvailableRemovableDrives
member.summary: Gets available removable media drives filtered for USB.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.GetAvailableProfiles
member.summary: Gets available USB creation profiles.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.CreateUSBAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initiates USB creation with the specified parameters.
member.param: The name for the USB device.
The profile to use (Gamer, Developer, AI Research, Secure, Enterprise).
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.EnableAdvancedMode
member.summary: Enables advanced mode when Ctrl+Shift+A is pressed. This provides access to additional configuration options.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.DisableAdvancedMode
member.summary: Disables advanced mode.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.IsAdvancedModeEnabled
member.summary: Gets whether advanced mode is currently enabled.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.SimpleUSBWizard.GetAdvancedOptions
member.summary: Gets extended configuration options (only available in advanced mode).
member.returns: Dictionary of advanced options with default values.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest
member.summary: Represents a USB creation request.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest.DeviceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the device name.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest.TargetDisk
member.summary: Gets or sets the target disk path.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest.Profile
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation profile.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest.AdvancedModeEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether advanced mode is enabled.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest.AdvancedOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets advanced configuration options.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBCreationOrchestrator
member.summary: Interface for USB creation orchestration.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBCreationOrchestrator.QueueUSBCreationAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Queues a USB creation request for processing.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.IUSBCreationOrchestrator.GetQueueStatus
member.summary: Gets the current queue status.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.QueueStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of the USB creation queue.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.QueueStatus.QueuedItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items in the queue.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.QueueStatus.BuildingItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently building item count.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.QueueStatus.EstimatedSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the estimated time to completion in seconds.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.QueueStatus.LastCompletedItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the last completed item.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates USB creation by hiding complexity behind a clean interface. Handles partition sizing, driver loading, boot configuration, and profile-specific customization.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the USBCreationOrchestrator class.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.QueueUSBCreationAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Queues a USB creation request for processing. Requests are prioritized: Secure > Enterprise > Gamer > Developer > AI Research.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.GetQueueStatus
member.summary: Gets the current queue status.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.ProcessQueueAsync
member.summary: Processes the queue sequentially.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.BuildUSBImageAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Builds the USB image with hidden complexity orchestration.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.GetPartitionConfiguration(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Gets partition configuration for the profile.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.GetProfileComponents(System.String)
member.summary: Gets components to load for a profile.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.ConfigureBootLoader(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Configures the boot loader based on profile requirements.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.ApplyProfileCustomizationAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Applies profile-specific customizations (simulated).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.WriteToTargetDiskAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Writes the configured USB image to the target disk.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationOrchestrator.GetEstimatedBuildTime(MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBCreationRequest)
member.summary: Estimates build time for a request in seconds.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache
member.summary: LRU (Least Recently Used) cache implementation for USB images. Maintains a maximum size limit of 50GB with automatic eviction.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry
member.summary: Represents a cache entry with metadata.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry.ImageData
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached image data.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the entry was created.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry.LastAccessedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the entry was last accessed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry.AccessCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the access count.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.CacheEntry.SizeBytes
member.summary: Gets the size in bytes.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the USBImageCache class.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.TryGetImage(System.String,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Tries to get a cached USB image. Updates LRU order and access metadata.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.StoreImage(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Stores a USB image in the cache. Evicts LRU entries if necessary to maintain size limit.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.GetStatistics
member.summary: Gets cache statistics.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.Clear
member.summary: Clears the cache.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.GetCacheContents
member.summary: Gets detailed cache contents (for diagnostics).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.USBImageCache.EvictLRUEntry
member.summary: Evicts the least recently used entry.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo
member.summary: Information about a cache entry.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache key.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo.SizeBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the size in bytes.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation time.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo.LastAccessedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the last access time.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.Services.CacheEntryInfo.AccessCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the access count.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTask
member.summary: Represents a single installation task.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTaskResult
member.summary: Installation task result with status and logs.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager
member.summary: Manages silent installations with logging and retry logic.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.ExecuteInstallationAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTask,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a single installation task with automatic retries.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.ExecuteProcessAsync(MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTask,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an installer process silently and captures output.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.DetermineSuccess(MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTask,System.String)
member.summary: Determines if installation succeeded based on output and success indicators.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.LogTaskResult(MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTaskResult,MonadoBlade.Boot.InstallationTask)
member.summary: Logs task result to both logger and file.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.ExportReport
member.summary: Exports all task results to a comprehensive installation report.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.GetLogDirectoryPath
member.summary: Gets the path to all installation logs.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SilentInstallationManager.GetTaskResults
member.summary: Gets all logged task results.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightCheckResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a single pre-flight check.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult
member.summary: Complete result of all pre-flight checks.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult.AllChecksPassed
member.summary: Whether all checks passed successfully.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult.TotalChecks
member.summary: Total number of checks performed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult.PassedChecks
member.summary: Number of checks that passed.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult.ElapsedTime
member.summary: Total elapsed time for all checks.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult.Results
member.summary: List of individual check results.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker
member.summary: Performs comprehensive system pre-flight checks before the wizard starts. Ensures all required conditions are met for a smooth installation experience.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.#ctor(Serilog.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SystemPreflightChecker class.
member.param: Optional logger instance for diagnostic output.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.RunChecksAsync
member.summary: Runs all pre-flight checks with a timeout.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckNetworkConnectivityAsync
member.summary: Checks network connectivity via DNS and ICMP ping.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckDiskSpaceAsync
member.summary: Checks available disk space (minimum 100GB required).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckAdminPermissions
member.summary: Checks if running with administrator privileges.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckUsbPortsAsync
member.summary: Checks for available USB 3.0 ports.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.GetUsbPortCountAsync
member.summary: Gets the count of available USB ports asynchronously.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckBitLockerStatus
member.summary: Checks BitLocker status and warns if enabled.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckAntivirusExclusionsAsync
member.summary: Checks antivirus exclusions for installation directory.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.CheckFirewallRulesAsync
member.summary: Checks firewall rules allow setup traffic.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.LogResults(MonadoBlade.Boot.PreflightResult)
member.summary: Logs the results of all pre-flight checks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Boot.SystemPreflightChecker.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes resources used by the checker.
